name: claudebook
description: Layered, AI-friendly project documentation for Claude Code. Two slash commands — /claudebook:write and /claudebook:revise — that generate and incrementally maintain a CLAUDE.md router plus topic docs, inventories, and pattern guides under .claude/docs/, so Claude loads only what's relevant to the current task and reuses existing components instead of recreating them.

commands.name: write
commands.description: Bootstrap the full claudebook documentation system for a new project.

commands.name: revise
commands.description: Incrementally update claudebook docs based on git changes since the last write/revise.
